title: nepeta nepetella var. lanceolata
intro: Nepeta nepetella var. lanceolata is a variety of the catmint plant, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory, which makes it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nepeta nepetella var. lanceolata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and providing relief from headaches and fever. Herbal preparations of Nepeta nepetella var. lanceolata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
